title: Decisions
questions: Would you like a job in which you had to make important decisions regularly?
Do you have to make decisions in the workplace?
How are good business decisions made?
Who do you ask for advice before making important decisions?
Have you ever made a decision and regretted it later?
Have you ever made a big decision and then changed your mind/had second thoughts?
Can you think of a situation in which you had to make a tough decision?
What is the hardest decision you've ever had to make? How did you make the decision?
Which situations/jobs do you think require quick decision makers?
Which situations benefit from considering all options slowly?
Have you ever made a decision that had negative consequences?
